summary: Comprehensive testing of Almira Florist e-commerce platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working well with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button not found with expected selector

integration_issues.issue: Add to cart buttons may not be properly integrated - cart remained empty during testing

design_issues.issue: Wishlist heart buttons not found on product cards

passed_tests: Homepage loading with hero section, categories, featured products
Checkout page loading and form fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix add to cart functionality integration between frontend and backend. Verify wishlist heart buttons are properly implemented on product cards. Check admin logout button implementation.
